description.en: Fairly portable uname interface. Returns a namedtuple() containing six attributes: system, node, release, version, machine, and processor. processor is resolved late, on demand. Note: the first two attribute names differ from the names presented by os.uname(), where they are named sysname and nodename. Entries which cannot be determined are set to ''. Changed in version 3.3: Result changed from a tuple to a namedtuple(). Changed in version 3.9: processor is resolved late instead of immediately.
